revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{cmbox |type=notice |image=[[Image:Nuvola apps filetypes.svg|40px| ]] |text=This category contains pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]] and help pages in the [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project namespace]]. It should not be used to categorise [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|articles]] or pages in other [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
'''Description''': {{{1}}}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{cmbox |type=notice |image=[[Image:Nuvola apps filetypes.svg|40px| ]] |text=This category contains pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]] and help pages in the [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project namespace]]. It should not be used to categorise [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|articles]] or pages in other [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
'''Description''': {{{1}}}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{cmbox |type=notice |image=[[Image:Nuvola apps filetypes.svg|40px| ]] |text=This category contains pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]] and help pages in the [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project namespace]]. '''Description''': {{{1}}}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Help_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Help_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{cmbox |type=notice |image=[[Image:Nuvola apps filetypes.svg|40px| ]] |text=This category contains pages in the [[Wikipedia:Help namespace|help namespace]] and help pages in the [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project namespace]]. It should not be used to categorise [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|articles]] or pages in other [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
'''Description''': {{{1}}}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

It should not be used to categorise [[Wikipedia:What is an article?|articles]] or pages in other [[Wikipedia:Namespace|namespaces]]. {{#if:{{{1|}}}|
